name: 蒋晟

appearance.distinguishing_features: 护人时的红脸与坚定眼神

visual_reference: handsome sturdy young Chinese martial artist, honest square face, strong build, short tied hair, wearing simple warrior hanfu, protective warm expression, ancient Chinese style, highly detailed, 8k
scene_presence: 马球会护送、陷害事件后娶陆姝仪
